svg.title: Touch Traversal offline graph pipeline
svg.desc: Markdown documents are deterministically parsed and chunked with provenance. Explicit, structural, temporal, entity, and semantic evidence becomes relation candidates. Signals are combined, pruned, repaired, clustered, laid out four ways, validated as one bundle, and atomically exported as static JSON.

div.style: color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Four normalized 3D layouts
semantic UMAP · community orbits
temporal axis · weighted force

div.style: color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Build bundle
graph · layouts · manifest · report

div.style: color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Cross-artifact validation
matching IDs + counts + schemas

div.style: color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Combine weighted signals
primary type + confidence
retain descriptions + evidence

div.style: color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Deterministic pruning
score · degree · density · edge limits

div.style: color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Repair isolated nodes
preserve explicit links

color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Stable discovery + parse
front matter · headings · links · dates

div.style: color: rgb(17, 17, 17) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Heading-aware chunks
stable IDs + line provenance

span.p:
Explainable candidates
explicit · structural · temporal · entity
local embeddings + semantic top-K
